events.description: World's first comprehensive binding regulatory framework for recommendation algorithms. events.description: Comprehensive regulation targeting AI-generated synthetic media including deepfakes. Article 19 explicitly requires compliance with Algorithm Recommendation Provisions' filing system. Joint issuance by CAC, MIIT, and MPS.

events.description: BDx Indonesia, a joint venture of BDx Data Centers, Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison, and Lintasarta, completed Phase 1 of the CGK4 AI campus, described as Indonesia's first renewable-powered AI data centre park. Equipped with NVIDIA accelerated computing and liquid cooling.
events.investment: 500MW scalable campus; 70MW Phase 1 across 4,150 sqm; 120kW/rack density; liquid cooling; 75-day deployment
events.name: BDx Indonesia AI Data Centre Campus (Jatiluhur)
events.location: Jatiluhur, Purwakarta Regency, West Java, Indonesia

events.description: Beijing Yizhuang AI Public Computing Platform (北京亦庄人工智能公共算力平台), operated by the Smart City Research Institute Group under Beijing Yizhuang Investment Holding Co., Ltd., deployed petaflops-scale AI computing at the National IT Innovation Park (国家信创园). Voucher-based access model subsidises domestically controlled foundation models for Beijing-area enterprises.
events.investment: 3,000 petaflops at launch (March 2024); expanded to 5,000 petaflops (January 2025); 10,000 petaflops target; ¥100M/year computing vouchers; ¥100M/year model vouchers; CECloud system integration
events.name: Beijing Yizhuang AI Public Computing Platform

events.description: YTL Power International commissioned an NVIDIA-powered AI data centre at the YTL Green Data Center Park, described as Malaysia's first NVIDIA-powered AI data centre. Deploys GB200 Grace Blackwell liquid-cooled NVL72 GPUs as sovereign AI compute infrastructure under bilateral technology partnership with NVIDIA.
events.investment: RM10B (~US$2.38B); 50% data centre infrastructure, 50% AI solutions including ILMU; 500MW solar; 600MW grid backup; 1,640 acres
events.name: YTL-NVIDIA Malaysia AI Data Centre (Johor)

environmentalNexusTags.name: Resource Demand
environmentalNexusTags.mechanism: AI data centre campus designed for up to 600MW capacity, powered by a dedicated 500MW on-site solar plant with 600MW national grid backup, documenting substantial energy resource demand from AI infrastructure operations.
